title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
style: body { background: linear-gradient(315deg, #FF0000 0%, #FF7F00 17%, #FFFF00 33%, #00FF00 50%, #00FFFF 67%, #0000FF 83%, #8B00FF 100%) !important; background-size: 1400% 1400% !important; animation: fluid 10s ease infinite !important; background-attachment: fixed !important; } @keyframes fluid { 0% {background-position: 0% 50%;} 50% {background-position: 100% 50%;} 100% {background-position: 0% 50%;} } .markdown-body, .side, .FileList { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .Header, .footer { background: transparent !important; } #left-panel { position: fixed; left: 15px; top: 15px; bottom: 15px; width: 250px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); border-radius: 10px; padding: 15px; z-index: 9999; box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); overflow-y: auto; display: flex; flex-direction: column; border: 2px solid #fff; transition: transform 0.3s; } #search-box { width: 100%; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; } .nav-item { display: block; padding: 8px; text-decoration: none; color: #333; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; font-size: 14px; } .nav-item:hover { background: #eee; color: #000; font-weight: bold; } .nav-label { font-weight: bold; margin-top: 10px; color: #555; background: #f0f0f0; padding: 5px; border-radius: 4px; } @media (max-width: 1200px) { #left-panel { transform: translateX(-280px); } #left-panel:hover { transform: translateX(0); } /* 手机端有个小把手 */ #left-panel::after { content: '>'; position: absolute; right: -20px; top: 50%; width: 20px; height: 40px; background: white; line-height: 40px; text-align: center; border-radius: 0 5px 5px 0; cursor: pointer; } }
script: <script src='//busuanzi.ibruce.info/busuanzi/2.3/busuanzi.pure.mini.js'></script><script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/view-image.js@2.0.0/view-image.min.js'></script><script>window.addEventListener('load',function(){ViewImage.init('.markdown-body img');});</script><script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { console.log('Plugins Loaded'); fetch('/blogBase.json').then(r => r.json()).then(d => { var p = document.createElement('div'); p.id = 'left-panel'; var s = document.createElement('input'); s.id = 'search-box'; s.placeholder = '🔍 搜索文章...'; s.oninput = function(e){ var v = e.target.value.toLowerCase(); p.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(i => { i.style.display = i.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(v) ? 'block' : 'none'; }) }; p.appendChild(s); var posts = Object.values(d).sort((a,b) => b.id - a.id); var map = {}; posts.forEach(x => { var l = x.labels[0] || '默认'; if(!map[l]) map[l] = []; map[l].push(x); }); Object.keys(map).sort().forEach(k => { var lb = document.createElement('div'); lb.className = 'nav-label'; lb.innerText = k; p.appendChild(lb); map[k].forEach(x => { var a = document.createElement('a'); a.className = 'nav-item'; a.href = x.postUrl; a.innerText = x.postTitle; p.appendChild(a); }); }); document.body.appendChild(p); }).catch(e => console.error(e)); });</script>
